title: Verify Cancellation Flow with Incentive Offer Rejection
description: Test the flow where a user rejects all retention efforts (reminder and incentive) and successfully cancels their trial.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the experiment cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the secondary action to cancel (e.g., 'No thanks, cancel anyway').

expected_result: The trial is immediately cancelled. The user loses access to premium content. A feedback pop-up is displayed. The homepage widget updates to the 'cancelled' state.
